testcase.classname: freezeCellModel marks a cell read-only and non-deletable
testcase.name: freezeCellModel marks a cell read-only and non-deletable

testcase.classname: thawCellModel removes the freeze metadata so the cell is editable again
testcase.name: thawCellModel removes the freeze metadata so the cell is editable again

testcase.classname: thawCellModel is a no-op for a cell that was never frozen
testcase.name: thawCellModel is a no-op for a cell that was never frozen

testcase.classname: isFrozen is true only when the cell is frozen
testcase.name: isFrozen is true only when the cell is frozen

testcase.classname: isFrozen is false when the cell is explicitly editable
testcase.name: isFrozen is false when the cell is explicitly editable
